title: rosa calva var. mokanensis
intro: Rosa calva var. mokanensis, also known as Chinese rose or Mokan rose, is a type of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae), native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it beneficial for skin and cardiovascular health. The plant's roots and flowers can be used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, and it may also have anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Rosa calva var. mokanensis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits.
